    News & Community Events

    Thanking Sheep River Health Trust for Their Generous Donation of Health Equipment

    Receiving support from community organizations can make a significant difference in healthcare services. Recently, we were fortunate to receive a generous donation from the Sheep River Health Trust: two portable blood pressure monitors and two nitrogen guns. These vital pieces of equipment will enhance our ability to provide timely and effective care. This post acknowledges their kindness and explains how these tools will benefit our healthcare efforts.
